reviews.comment:
Cobran sobreprecios. No hay razón para ello. La región patagónica en su mayoría de estaciones tiene la Infinia a 75.60. Hoy cargue en la estación de referencia a 78.50.

(Translated by Google)
They charge exorbitant prices. There's no reason for it. In the Patagonian region, most stations charge 75.60 for Infinia. Today I filled up at the reference station for 78.50.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5Ni1YYy13RRAB
